airport.name: CSMIA Inspired International Airport Navigation Model
airport.style: clean semi-realistic low-poly glass airport for interactive WebGL navigation

exports.runtime_model: Click Export GLB in the app to serialize the generated Three.js scene.

features: Two terminals with entry, check-in, security, immigration, lounges, boarding gates, retail, food court, restrooms, elevators, escalators, and baggage claim
Clickable shops, gates, services, graph nodes, and walkable edges
Dijkstra shortest path routing from assistant text such as Take me to Gate B4
Animated glowing path, smooth camera transitions, top-down and free camera controls
Low-poly moving passengers, day/night lighting toggle, and flight info screens
